name: positive-explicit-invoke
query: /design-log I want to add a reminder-email escalation flow to a client portal — clients who haven't uploaded docs after 7 days get a second email with a different tone.
expected_behavior: Dispatches the Pre-Phase-A relevance grep to an explore/haiku subagent with task-derived search terms (including Hebrew UI labels) and surfaces a 'Related prior DLs' list
Asks Phase A clarifying questions via AskUserQuestion and waits — does not skip because the task 'seems specific'
Runs Bash date +%Y-%m-%d before any research MCP call, and uses Tavily/Exa/Firecrawl (not WebSearch/WebFetch)
Calls EnterPlanMode as the FIRST Phase C tool call, creates the DL file with [DRAFT] status inside plan mode, then ExitPlanMode as the single approval gate
Does not write any implementation code before ExitPlanMode approval
